name: Pansage
description: This Pokémon dwells deep in the forest. Eating a leaf from its head whisks weariness away as if by magic.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

name: Simisage
description: Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.

attacks.name: Fire's Power
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Fire Energy attached to it, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Sewaddle
description: Leavanny dress it in clothes they made for it when it hatched. It hides its head in its hood while it is sleeping.

attacks.name: String Shot
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Sewaddle
description: This Pokémon makes clothes for itself. It chews up leaves and sews them with sticky thread extruded from its mouth.

name: Swadloon
description: It protects itself from the cold by wrapping up in leaves. It stays on the move, eating leaves in forests.

attacks.name: Double Razor Leaf
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

name: Swadloon
description: Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life.

attacks.name: Grass Cocooning
attacks.effect: Heal 40 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Leavanny
description: Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves, using the cutters on its arms and sticky silk.

attacks.name: Nurturing
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your Pokémon. Search your deck for a card that evolves from that Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: X-Scissor
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.

name: Leavanny
description: It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle.

attacks.name: Triple Cutter
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 60 damage times the number of heads.

name: Cottonee
description: They go wherever the wind takes them. On rainy days, their bodies are heavier, so they take shelter beneath big trees.

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Cottonee
description: When attacked, it escapes by shooting cotton from its body. The cotton serves as a decoy to distract the attacker.

attacks.name: Cotton Guard
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Whimsicott
description: Like the wind, it can slip through any gap, no matter how small. It leaves balls of white fluff behind.

attacks.name: Helping Hand
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Cotton Guard
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Whimsicott
description: Riding whirlwinds, they appear. These Pokémon sneak through gaps into houses and cause all sorts of mischief.

attacks.name: Encore
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can use only that attack.

attacks.name: U-turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Petilil
description: The leaves on its head are very bitter. Eating one of these leaves is known to refresh a tired body.

attacks.name: Stun Spore
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Lilligant
description: Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.

attacks.name: Bemusing Aroma
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed and Poisoned. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Deerling
description: The turning of the seasons changes the color and scent of this Pokémon's fur. People use it to mark the seasons.

attacks.name: Wild Kick
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Sawsbuck
description: The plants growing on its horns change according to the season. The leaders of the herd possess magnificent horns.

attacks.name: Push Down
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

name: Virizion
description: This Pokémon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down.

attacks.name: Giga Drain
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sacred Sword
attacks.effect: This Pokémon can't use Sacred Sword during your next turn.

name: Pansear
description: This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600º F.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

name: Simisear
description: A flame burns inside its body. It scatters embers from its head and tail to sear its opponents.

attacks.name: Water's Power
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Water Energy attached to it, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Darumaka
description: When its internal fire is burning, it cannot calm down and it runs around. When the fire diminishes, it falls asleep.

name: Darmanitan
description: Its internal fire burns at 2,500º F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.

attacks.name: Rock Smash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Fire Punch
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Panpour
description: It does not thrive in dry environments. It keeps itself damp by shooting water stored in its head tuft from its tail.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

name: Simipour
description: The tuft on its head holds water. When the level runs low, it replenishes the tuft by siphoning up water with its tail.

attacks.name: Grass' Power
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Grass Energy attached to it, heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rushing Water
attacks.effect: Move an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Basculin
description: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they'll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.

attacks.name: Flail
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Final Gambit
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are tails, this Pokémon does 80 damage to itself.

name: Basculin
description: Red and blue Basculin usually do not get along, but sometimes members of one school mingle with the other's school.

attacks.name: Splatter
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage to one of your oppoent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Ducklett
description: When attacked, it uses its feathers to splash water, escaping under cover of the spray.

attacks.name: Roost
attacks.effect: Heal 40 damage from this Pokémon. This Pokémon can't retreat during your next turn.

name: Swanna
description: It administers sharp, powerful pecks with its bill. It whips its long neck to deliver forceful repeated strikes.

attacks.name: Wing Dance
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Air Slash
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Cubchoo
description: When it is not feeling well, its mucus gets watery and the power of its Ice-type moves decreases.

attacks.name: Powder Snow
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Rest
attacks.effect: Heal 60 damage from this Pokémon. This Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Cubchoo
description: Its nose is always running. It sniffs the snot back up because the mucus provides the raw material for its moves.

name: Beartic
description: It can make its breath freeze at will. Very able in the water, it swims around in northern seas and catches prey.

attacks.name: Sheer Cold
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Icicle Crash
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

name: Beartic
description: It freezes its breath to create fangs and claws of ice to fight with. Cold northern areas are its habitat.

attacks.name: Icy Wind
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Superpower
attacks.effect: You may do 20 more damage. If you do, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

name: Emolga
description: The energy made in its cheeks' electric pouches is stored inside its membranes and released while it is gliding.

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Acrobatics
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

name: Joltik
description: Joltik that live in cities have learned a technique for sucking electricity from the outlets in houses.

name: Galvantula
description: When attacked, they create an electric barrier by spitting out many electrically charged threads.

attacks.name: Stun Needle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Thundurus
description: The spikes on its tail discharge immense bolts of lightning. It flies around the Unova region firing off lightning bolts.

attacks.name: Charge
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Lightning Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Disaster Volt
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Woobat
description: Its habitat is dark forests and caves. It emits ultrasonic waves from its nose to learn about its surroundings.

attacks.name: Psy Bolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Swoobat
description: Anyone who comes into contact with the ultrasonic waves emitted by a courting male experiences a positive mood shift.

attacks.name: Phat Sound
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Venipede
description: It discovers what is going on around it by using the feelers on its head and tail. It is brutally aggressive.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Whirlipede
description: It is usually motionless, but when attacked, it rotates at high speed and then crashes into its opponent.

attacks.name: Venoshock
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Steamroller
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

name: Scolipede
description: With quick movements, it chases down its foes, attacking relentlessly with its horns until it prevails.

attacks.name: Toxic Claws
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. Put 2 damage counters instead of 1 on that Pokémon between turns.

attacks.name: Wild Horn
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

name: Sigilyph
description: The guardians of an ancient city, they use their psychic power to attack enemies that invade their territory.

attacks.name: Reflect
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 40 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Telekinesis
attacks.effect: Does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

name: Sigilyph
description: They never vary the route they fly, because their memories of guarding an ancient city remain steadfast.

attacks.name: Quick Turn
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Psychic Assault
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Gothita
description: Their ribbonlike feelers increase their psychic power. They are always staring at something.

attacks.name: Hypnotic Gaze
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Double Slap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Gothita
description: They intently observe both Trainers and Pokémon. Apparently, they are looking at something that only Gothita can see.

name: Gothorita
description: They use hypnosis to control people and Pokémon. Tales of Gothorita leading people astray are told in every corner.

attacks.name: Double Slap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Gothorita
description: Starlight is the source of their power. At night, they mark star positions by using psychic power to float stones.

attacks.name: Deleting Glare
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Gothitelle
description: Starry skies thousands of light-years away are visible in the space distorted by their intense psychic power.

abilities.name: Magic Room
abilities.effect: As long as this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, your opponent can’t play any Item cards from his or her hand.

attacks.name: Madkinesis
attacks.effect: Does 20 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Gothitelle
description: They can predict the future from the placement and movement of the stars. They can see Trainers' life spans.

attacks.name: Mental Shock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused. If tails, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Roggenrola
description: Its ear is hexagonal in shape. Compressed underground, its body is as hard as steel.

attacks.name: Harden
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon would be damaged by an attack, prevent that attack's damage done to this Pokémon if that damage is 40 or less.

name: Roggenrola
description: They were discovered a hundred years ago in an earthquake fissure. Inside each one is an energy core.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

name: Boldore
description: When it overflows with power, the orange crystal on its body glows. It looks for underground water in caves.

attacks.name: Smack Down
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon has Fighting Resistance, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Boldore
description: Because its energy was too great to be contained, the energy leaked and formed orange crystals.

attacks.name: Hard Crash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage. If tails, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

name: Gigalith
description: The solar energy absorbed by its body's orange crystals is magnified internally and fired from its mouth.

attacks.name: Shear
attacks.effect: Discard the top 5 cards of your deck. If any of those cards are Fighting Energy cards, attach them to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rock Bullet
attacks.effect: Does 20 more damage for each Fighting Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Drilbur
description: It can dig through the ground at a speed of 30 mph. It could give a car running aboveground a good race.

attacks.name: Hone Claws
attacks.effect: During your next turn, each of this Pokémon's attacks does 30 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Drilbur
description: It makes its way swiftly through the soil by putting both claws together and rotating at high speed.

name: Excadrill
description: It can help in tunnel construction. Its drill has evolved into steel strong enough to bore through iron plates.

attacks.name: Drill Run
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Excadrill
description: More than 300 feet below the surface, they build mazelike nests. Their activity can be destructive to subway tunnels.

attacks.name: Dig
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Throh
description: When it tightens its belt, it becomes stronger. Wild Throh use vines to weave their own belts.

attacks.name: Scarf Hold
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

name: Sawk
description: Tying their belts gets them pumped and makes their punches more destructive. Disturbing their training angers them.

attacks.name: Five Fierce Chops
attacks.effect: Flip 5 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads. This Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.

name: Sandile
description: They live buried in the sands of the desert. The sun-warmed sands prevent their body temperature from dropping.

name: Krokorok
description: They live in groups of a few individuals. Protective membranes shield their eyes from sandstorms.

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Krookodile
description: They never allow prey to escape. Their jaws are so powerful, they can crush the body of an automobile.

abilities.name: Black Eyes
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, you may flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent’s Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thrash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage. If tails, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

name: Terrakion

attacks.name: Sacred Sword
attacks.effect: This Pokémon can't use Sacred Sword during your next turn.

name: Purrloin
description: They steal from people for fun, but their victims can't help but forgive them. Their deceptively cute act is perfect.

attacks.name: Knock Off
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

name: Liepard
description: These Pokémon vanish and appear unexpectedly. Many Trainers are drawn to their beautiful form and fur.

attacks.name: Feint Attack
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Claw Rend
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 30 more damage.

name: Zorua
description: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.

attacks.name: Rising Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

name: Zoroark
description: Bonds between these Pokémon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Vullaby
description: They tend to guard their posteriors with suitable bones they have found. They pursue weak Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rear Guard
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Mandibuzz
description: Watching from the sky, they swoop to strike weakened Pokémon on the ground. They decorate themselves with bones.

attacks.name: Bone Rush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Dark Pulse
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each Darkness Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

name: Ferroseed
description: They stick their spikes into cave walls and absorb the minerals they find in the rock.

attacks.name: Pin Missile
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Ferroseed
description: When threatened, it attacks by shooting a barrage of spikes, which gives it a chance to escape by rolling away.

name: Ferrothorn
description: They attach themselves to cave ceilings, firing steel spikes at targets passing beneath them.

attacks.name: Steel Feelers
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Gyro Ball
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Then, your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

name: Ferrothorn
description: It fights by swinging around its three spiky feelers. A hit from these steel spikes can reduce a boulder to rubble.

attacks.name: Iron Defense
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Power Whip
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage for each Energy attached to this Pokémon to one of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Klink
description: Interlocking two bodies and spinning around generates the energy they need to live.

attacks.name: Gear Grind
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

name: Klang
description: Spinning minigears are rotated at high speed and repeatedly fired away. It is dangerous if the gears don't return.

attacks.name: Metal Sound
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Klinklang

attacks.name: Charge Beam
attacks.effect: Attach an Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Zap Cannon
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon can't use Zap Cannon during your next turn.

name: Cobalion
description: This legendary Pokémon battled against humans to protect Pokémon. Its personality is calm and composed.

attacks.name: Metal Horns
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sacred Sword
attacks.effect: This Pokémon can't use Sacred Sword during your next turn.

name: Patrat
description: Extremely cautious, they take shifts to maintain a constant watch of their nest. They feel insecure without a lookout.

attacks.name: Hyper Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Watchog
description: When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches.

attacks.name: Watcheck
attacks.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of your opponent's deck and put them back on top of his or her deck in any order.

attacks.name: Quick Tail Smash
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, you may flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Pidove
description: Each follows its Trainer's orders as best it can, but they sometimes fail to understand complicated commands.

name: Tranquill
description: Many people believe that, deep in the forest where Tranquill live, there is a peaceful place where there is no war.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Unfezant
description: Males have plumage on their heads. They will never let themselves fell close to anyone other than their Trainers.

attacks.name: Tailwind
attacks.effect: Attach an Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Feather Strike
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage. If tails, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Audino
description: Its auditory sense is astounding. It has a radar-like ability to understand its surrounding through slight sounds.

attacks.name: Powerful Slap
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Heal Pulse
attacks.effect: Heal 50 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

name: Minccino
description: These Pokémon prefer a tidy habitat. They are always sweeping and dusting, using their tails as brooms.

attacks.name: Last Resort
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Cinccino
description: Their white fur feels amazing to touch. Their fur repels dust and prevents static electricity from building up.

attacks.name: Captivate
attacks.effect: Switch the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fluffy Tail
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Rufflet
description: They will challenge anything, even strong opponents, without fear. Their frequent fights help them become stronger.

name: Rufflet
description: They crush berries with their talons. They bravely stand up to any opponent, no matter how strong it is.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Braviary
description: The more scars they have, the more respect these brave soldiers of the sky get from their peers.

attacks.name: Brave Bird

name: Tornadus
description: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.

attacks.effect: Move an Energy from 1 of your Benched Pokémon to this Pokémon.

attacks.effect: Move a basic Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Bianca

name: Crushing Hammer
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon.

name: Great Ball
effect: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Pokémon you find there and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

name: Max Potion
effect: Heal all damage from 1 of your Pokémon. Then, discard all Energy attached to that Pokémon.

name: Pokémon Catcher
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, switch 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon with his or her Active Pokémon.

name: Recycle
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, put a card from your discard pile on top of your deck.

name: Thundurus
description: The spikes on its tail discharge immense bolts of lightning. It flies around the Unova region firing off lightning bolts.

attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Lightning Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.
